mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, avatar, email, signature, role, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND password = #{password} AND status = 1
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE role = #{role} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT FROM sys_user ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, nickname, avatar, email, signature, role, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{email}, #{signature}, #{role}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
